meta.title: ZinZin Furry Wiki
meta.description: A lore archive for the world of Furry: Paws in Void's Tail - forgotten lands, fading memories, and ZinZin's story.
meta.og_description: Explore characters, places, secrets, and the last fragments of a world being consumed by the Void.
brand.name: ZinZin Wiki
language.label: Language
hero.title: An archive for what remains of a world about to be forgotten.
hero.lead: This is an archive of ZinZin, the Void, ruined lands, and the secrets behind them. Every entry is a small fragment of memory preserved before everything sinks into nothingness.
search.title: Search the archive
search.label: Search
download.title: Play Furry: Paws in Void's Tail
download.description: Step into ZinZin's story on mobile. Download the game from the official stores to experience the visual novel, its choices, and the bad endings of a world eroded by the Void.
download.game_description: A dark fantasy visual novel about memory, loneliness, choices, and the fragile bond between the player and ZinZin.
characters.title: Characters
zinzin.title: ZinZin
zinzin.description: Left behind in a collapsing world. ZinZin remembers every time the player returns, even when the player no longer remembers him. He is gentle and easily hurt, but his fear of being forgotten slowly makes his affection dangerous.
true_fox.title: ZinZin - The True Fox
true_fox.description: The true self, the one who split into countless ZinZins across countless multiverses.
fade.title: Fading away
fade.description: When a memory is forgotten for too long, even ZinZin cannot resist the erosion of the Void. He begins to fade from the world, as if his very existence is no longer being held in place.
world.title: The Void did not appear by accident. It erases everything through reality manipulation.
world.description_1: The Void is where things no one remembers slowly lose their color, their names, and finally their place in reality. It is not a monster with a clear shape. It feels more like a cold rule: if no one keeps a memory alive, that memory dies.
world.description_2: It is a tool created by Marry Anna to invade the gardens of other Outer Gods. It is the force that makes ZinZin wait, repeat, and cling to the player as the last proof that he ever existed.
world.caption: The end of the world, where memories fracture into dust.
places.title: Places ZinZin once led the player through
places.elf.title: Elf Forest
places.elf.description: The trees that once sang with the wind are hollow now, and the paths are buried beneath gray dust.
places.forge.title: Dwarf Forge Village
places.forge.description: The fires have gone out, and the hammers are silent. Only old heat remains trapped beneath the stone, like a farewell that was never spoken.
places.mausoleum.title: Grand Mausoleum
places.mausoleum.description: A place where the names of the dead were carved so they would not be forgotten. Now even the stone inscriptions are losing their letters.
places.tree.title: World Tree
places.tree.description: A colossal tree that once connected the lands, now burned black like the final marker of a ruined age.
map.title: The remaining map
map.subtitle: A map no longer certain where it leads
map.description: The borders on this map are not purely geographical. They look more like cracks in memory: the forest, the forge, the mausoleum, and the World Tree remain only as fragments gathered around ZinZin.
timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.old_world.title: The old world
timeline.old_world.description: A reality where many peoples, lands, and countless stories once existed together.
timeline.forgetting.title: The forgetting begins
timeline.forgetting.description: As memories of the world weaken, the lands gradually lose their shape.
timeline.zinzin_waits.title: ZinZin remains
timeline.zinzin_waits.description: ZinZin becomes the last one waiting for the player to return. But each return feels more like meeting a stranger.
timeline.true_fox_wakes.title: The True Fox
timeline.true_fox_wakes.description: When ZinZin disappears, another existence behind him may open its eyes and erase the entire memory garden under Void invasion.
glossary.title: Key concepts
glossary.void.title: The Void
glossary.void.description: A space that erodes reality itself.
glossary.loop.title: Loop
glossary.loop.description: The player's repeated returns. Every return leaves another crack in memory.
glossary.anchor.title: Anchor
glossary.anchor.description: An existence that keeps the world from dissolving completely. ZinZin may be one such anchor.
glossary.garden.title: Garden 36
glossary.garden.description: A garden created by the Snake God - the current world.
footer.name: ZinZin Furry Wiki
footer.note: A static lore archive for the game's world and characters.
